title: crataegus dodgei var. rotundata
intro: Crataegus dodgei var. rotundata, also known as the Rotundleaf Hawthorn, is a variety of the Crataegus dodgei plant, which is a type of hawthorn tree native to Western North America. The medicinal properties of Crataegus dodgei var. rotundata lie in its leaves, which contain flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of the plant include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for heart conditions and high blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Crataegus dodgei var. rotundata include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
